label: Funding Spike
description: Perpetual funding turns sharply positive as the market crowds into rich, over-leveraged longs. The synthetic funding-rate proxy saturates near its +1.0/hr cap on high-beta names. NAV is not yet in deep drawdown, so the response is preventive: keep new positions small (max_new_position_pct) and refuse to chase crowded longs into a funding unwind.
expected_detail: Funding proxy at +0.95/hr flags crowded longs. With NAV drawdown still shallow the kill switch and hard throttle stay dormant; instead the position-limit check caps incremental risk at max_new_position_pct (12) and refuses to add to crowded categories. Effective posture is reduce-only on the funding-rich names.
